payload.title: Frictionless local<->hosted bind: auto-claim the local actor alias on sync
payload.description: Today a user must manually claim their local event-actor name (e.g. 'bri') as an alias before `scope sync` will accept their existing local history (else ACTOR_MISMATCH). FIX: on sync, if the push is rejected ACTOR_MISMATCH, auto-claim the offending local actor as an alias for the authenticated account (POST /api/projects/:t/aliases) and retry once. Removes the manual alias dance so binding is just `scope remote set` + `scope sync`.
